name: Blackjack Bourbon Peach Sauce (Barnard)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup raspberry vinegar or other fruit vinegar
3/4 teaspoon hot pepper sauce, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine all ingredients except hot pepper sauce.
2. Simmer over medium-low heat, stirring often until lightly thickened, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the hot pepper sauce to taste.
The sauce can be made up to a month ahead and refrigerated. Reheat before brushing on during the last 10 minutes of grilling.
